Text.val: // お互いのテーブルが存在した場合
// トリガ作成テーブル項目

SQL_STMT_U.val: IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.triggers WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[TRIGGER :1]')) DROP TRIGGER [dbo].[TRIGGER :1]

CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[TRIGGER :1] ON [dbo].[:2] FOR :3 AS declare @bintEqid as bigint insert into cidentity(para) values (0) select @bintEqid = @@identity INSERT [dbo].[:4] select CONVERT(char(19), GetDate(),120)+STR(@bintEqid%1000000,6,0),:8,:5,0,:6 from :7
